label: Openagentic (Code Sessions)
description: Run user-supplied code (Python/JS/etc.) inside an isolated openagentic-manager session. Returns the stdout/stderr/exitCode envelope.

settings.name: code
settings.label: Code
settings.description: Code to run inside the openagentic-manager session. Supports {{template}} variables.

settings.name: timeout
settings.label: Timeout (ms)
settings.description: Max wall time before the session is killed.

ai.shortDescription: Run code in an isolated openagentic-manager session.
ai.whenToUse: When the workflow needs to run heavier code than fits the JS sandbox — e.g. python data analysis, shell commands, or anything that needs filesystem access inside a controlled session.
ai.examplePrompt: add an openagentic step that runs `pandas.read_csv` on the upstream output
ai.promptHints: Reference the result with {{steps.<id>.stdout}}. The session terminates after `timeout`. Code is templated against the upstream input.

outputAssertions.name: openagentic_session_completed
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Openagentic session did not complete successfully (sessionStatus was failed/timeout/etc.).

outputAssertions.name: openagentic_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || (!result.transcript && !result.summary) || !((result.transcript && typeof result.transcript === 'string' && result.transcript.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)) || (result.summary && typeof result.summary === 'string' && result.summary.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)))
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Openagentic session returned a refusal or 'no info' response.
